sections.heading: What is Lazy Loading & Code Splitting?
sections.body: Load resources on demand, dynamic imports, and intersection observer. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Lazy Loading & Code Splitting is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Lazy Loading & Code Splitting is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Lazy Loading & Code Splitting every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Lazy Loading & Code Splitting implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Lazy Loading & Code Splitting is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
